visual_rule: Compact electric pre-strike orb with a bright nucleus, cyan shell, and contained branching arcs.
prompt: Create a transparent-background 2D battle VFX asset for Pokemon-style lightning attacks. Show only the effect element, with no character, arena, text, UI, watermark, or frame. Use a compact pre-strike orb with a white-hot core, cyan outer glow, and a few thin branching arcs that feel charged and contained. Keep the shape clean and readable in a game battle overlay. Preserve real electric energy structure but stylize the outline and color. Output a single isolated effect element on transparency.
